events.label: reasoning
events.text: The user wants a JSON answer. I need to identify the component/condition and defect cues for PPE selection with arc-flash rating below task category (label vs. clothing - DOC+ID). This is a fail, high/critical risk, residential, rough-complete, installed-defective/non-compliant. Need to output exactly one valid JSON object.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Arc-flash protective clothing rating is below the hazard/risk category indicated on the equipment label or required by the task.", "PPE selection does not match the documented arc-flash incident energy or category for the work being performed.", "Worker is not adequately protected against potential arc-flash exposure."],
  "actions": ["Stop work immediately on the affected circuit/equipment.", "Verify the equipment label or arc-flash hazard analysis and select PPE/clothing with an arc rating equal to or greater than the required incident energy or PPE category.", "Provide compliant arc-rated clothing and required PPE (e.g., faceshield, head/eye/hand/foot protection) before resuming work.", "Re-train affected workers on NFPA 70E PPE selection and hazard assessment requirements."],
  "rationale": "NFPA 70E requires arc-rated clothing and PPE with an arc rating at or above the incident energy or PPE category for the task. Clothing with a lower rating than the label/category exposes the worker to serious burn injury and violates OSHA 1910 Subpart I PPE requirements.",
  "references": ["NFPA 70E", "OSHA 1910 Subpart I"]
}
